desc: Build a complete TypeScript RAG system for user documentation with these components: 1) package.json with Bun/TypeScript dependencies (pglite, ollama), 2) src/db.ts - PGlite vector database setup with 768-dim embeddings, 3) src/chunker.ts - Document chunking by headings/paragraphs, 4) src/embeddings.ts - Ollama nomic-embed-text integration, 5) src/ingest.ts - Document ingestion pipeline, 6) src/search.ts - Semantic search with similarity scores, 7) src/index.ts - CLI interface (ingest/search/stats commands), 8) tsconfig.json - TypeScript config. The system should read docs from docs/ directory, chunk them, generate embeddings via local Ollama, store in PGlite, and provide semantic search. Use Bun runtime. Make all files complete and working.
